# Investigate alternative OAuth providers

## Goal
Evaluate alternative providers in response to the current OAuth provider's spec change, and develop a migration plan.

## Background
The OAuth provider used by Sample Project changed their API spec, causing delays in the auth feature implementation. According to Alex Chen's report, this is not merely a technical issue but also affects the contractual relationship.
